Container.Name: RustSearch
Container.Overview:
RustSearch is a minimalist, privacy-focused metasearch engine with an integrated AI assistant. It proxies queries through SearXNG to protect your privacy, and processes AI queries using a user-configured self-hosted Ollama server.
Key Features: - High performance and tiny resource footprint. - Dynamic theme options based on the 6 Super Metroid locations (Crateria, Brinstar, Norfair, Wrecked Ship, Maridia, Tourian). - Multilingual interface support. - Optional access PIN encryption for privacy.
Container.Requires: SearXNG metasearch runs inside the same container in the background.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The host port mapped to the web server (default container port: 4408).

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional numerical PIN to lock access to the rustsearch interface (leave empty for public mode).

Config.Name: Site Title
Config.Description: Custom website title rendered in the navigation header or browser tab.

Config.Name: Ollama Base URL
Config.Description: URL of the self-hosted Ollama server (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:11434).

Config.Name: Ollama Model
Config.Description: Model name to use for AI inference on the Ollama server (e.g. llama3, llama3:8b, mistral, etc.).

Config.Name: Enable Translation Selector
Config.Description: Enable the multi-language / translation selector in the navigation header (true/false). Defaults to true.

Config.Name: Max Connection Attempts
Config.Description: Number of failed PIN attempts permitted before locking out the user client IP address.
